overall.description: A cinematic Unreal Engine sequence depicting a foggy medieval village at night, transitioning from mist to light rain as the camera slowly pans left past warmly lit wooden houses and stone walls, revealing festive pennant decorations.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty village clearing with central wooden house and stone wall

agents.ego_description: slowly panning the camera left while standing near a stone wall, observing the village architecture in the foggy night

entered.detail: rustic two-story wooden house with warm glowing windows and steep roof
low stone wall running horizontally across the foreground
tall wooden lamp post with warm orange lantern light
steep rocky cliff face forming the backdrop behind the village
tall trees with hanging branches framing the top of the view

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a foggy medieval village at night, centered on a warmly lit wooden house. A stone wall runs through the foreground while a lamp post glows on the right. The camera slowly pans left, revealing the misty atmosphere and rocky cliff backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy village square revealing left-side buildings and festive decorations

events.description: rain begins to fall, creating visible streaks illuminated by the warm lantern light

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left through the light rain, revealing more of the village architecture and festive decorations

entered.detail: taller wooden structure with multiple lit windows and dark roof
red and white triangular pennant flags strung on a line

segments.scene_description: As rain begins to fall around the 14-second mark, the camera continues panning left to reveal a taller building on the left side of the village. The main house shifts to the right of the frame while red and white pennant banners become visible on the far left. The rain creates atmospheric streaks in the lantern light as the mist persists.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera pan across a foggy medieval village at night that transitions from a still, misty atmosphere into a light rainfall. It begins centered on a warmly lit wooden house beside a stone wall, with a glowing lamp post on the right and rocky cliffs looming in the distance. As the camera slowly glides to the left, the mist persists while rain begins to fall, creating atmospheric streaks within the lantern light. The scene then expands to reveal a taller building on the left as the original house shifts toward the right of the frame. Finally, the movement unveils red and white pennant banners fluttering on the far left, completing the sweep of the rain-slicked village.
